must.title: aria-pressed state
must.description: Use aria-pressed="true|false" to communicate toggled state to screen readers

must.title: Keyboard accessible
must.description: Toggle must be operable via Enter and Space keys

must.title: Accessible name
must.description: Button must have a label that identifies its purpose, not just its state

should.title: Visual state change
should.description: Clearly communicate state change visually, not with color alone

should.title: State reflected in label
should.description: Consider updating aria-label to reflect current state (e.g., 'Mute' vs 'Unmute')

avoid.title: Color-only state indication
avoid.description: Don't use color as the only indicator of toggled state

avoid.title: Misusing checkbox role
avoid.description: Don't use role="checkbox" for toggle buttons that trigger actions

react.label: React Toggle Button

tests.title: State Announcement Test
steps: Verify state change is announced (pressed/not pressed)
